shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md; printf '\\n--- LightboxRoot ---\\n'; sed -n '1,260p' src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx; printf '\\n--- Root ---\\n'; sed -n '1,300p' src/modules/Root.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' test/unit/RTL.spec.ts; printf '\\n--- package ---\\n'; sed -n '1,180p' package.json; printf '\\n--- direction refs ---\\n'; rg -n \"direction|RTL|rtl|getComputedStyle|useState\" src test/unit"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "React lightbox computed CSS direction RTL getComputedStyle cached state runtime dir attribute" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useForkRef.ts; sed -n '1,180p' src/contexts/DocumentContext.tsx; sed -n '1,180p' src/modules/Navigation/useKeyboardNavigation.ts; sed -n '1,160p' test/unit/test-utils.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' vitest.config.ts; sed -n '1,180p' test/unit/setup.ts; git log -8 --oneline -- src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx test/unit/RTL.spec.ts"
